option.name: filePath
option.value: /Block (snapshot).cpp

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /CMakeLists (snapshot).txt

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.1 ) project(mecraft)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17) find_package(glfw3 REQUIRED) find_package(glm CONFIG REQUIRED) add_executable(mecraft main.cpp glad.c src/core/Window.cpp src/core/Window.h src/core/Camera.cpp src/core/Camera.h src/core/InputManager.cpp src/core/InputManager.h src/renderer/Shader.cpp src/renderer/Shader.h src/core/Game.cpp src/core/Game.h src/core/Time.cpp src/core/Time.h src/player/Player.cpp src/player/Player.h src/renderer/TestCube.cpp src/renderer/TestCube.h assets/third_party/stb/stb_image.h src/renderer/stb_image.cpp src/resource/ResourceMgr.cpp src/resource/ResourceMgr.h src/renderer/Renderer.cpp src/renderer/Renderer.h src/player/ActionMap.cpp src/player/ActionMap.h src/core/InputContextManager.h src/core/InputContextManager.cpp src/core/states/GameplayState.h src/core/states/UIState.h src/core/GameStateMachine.cpp) include_directories(assets/third_party) target_link_libraries(mecraft PRIVATE glfw glm::glm) target_compile_definitions(mecraft PRIVATE GLFW_INCLUDE_NONE)

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.1 ) project(mecraft)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17) find_package(glfw3 REQUIRED) find_package(glm CONFIG REQUIRED) add_executable(mecraft main.cpp glad.c src/core/Window.cpp src/core/Window.h src/core/Camera.cpp src/core/Camera.h src/core/InputManager.cpp src/core/InputManager.h src/renderer/Shader.cpp src/renderer/Shader.h src/core/Game.cpp src/core/Game.h src/core/Time.cpp src/core/Time.h src/player/Player.cpp src/player/Player.h src/renderer/TestCube.cpp src/renderer/TestCube.h assets/third_party/stb/stb_image.h src/renderer/stb_image.cpp src/resource/ResourceMgr.cpp src/resource/ResourceMgr.h src/renderer/Renderer.cpp src/renderer/Renderer.h src/player/ActionMap.cpp src/player/ActionMap.h src/core/InputContextManager.h src/core/InputContextManager.cpp src/core/IGameState.h src/core/GameStateMachine.h src/core/GameStateMachine.cpp src/core/states/GameplayState.h src/core/states/UIState.h) include_directories(assets/third_party) target_link_libraries(mecraft PRIVATE glfw glm::glm) target_compile_definitions(mecraft PRIVATE GLFW_INCLUDE_NONE)

option.name: filePath

filePath
option.value: /Dashboard (snapshot).cpp

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /DependInfo (snapshot).cmake

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Consider dependencies only in project. set(CMAKE_DEPENDS_IN_PROJECT_ONLY OFF)
# The set of languages for which implicit dependencies are needed: set(CMAKE_DEPENDS_LANGUAGES )
# The set of dependency files which are needed: set(CMAKE_DEPENDS_DEPENDENCY_FILES "D:/project/mecraft/glad.c" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/glad.c.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/glad.c.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/main.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/main.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/main.cpp.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/src/core/Camera.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/core/Camera.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/core/Camera.cpp.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/src/core/Game.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/core/Game.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/core/Game.cpp.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/src/core/GameStateMachine.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/core/GameStateMachine.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/core/GameStateMachine.cpp.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/src/core/InputContextManager.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/core/InputContextManager.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/core/InputContextManager.cpp.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/src/core/InputManager.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/core/InputManager.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/core/InputManager.cpp.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/src/core/Time.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/core/Time.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/core/Time.cpp.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/src/core/Window.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/core/Window.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/core/Window.cpp.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/src/player/ActionMap.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/player/ActionMap.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/player/ActionMap.cpp.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/src/player/Player.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/player/Player.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/player/Player.cpp.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/src/renderer/Renderer.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/renderer/Renderer.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/renderer/Renderer.cpp.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/src/renderer/Shader.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/renderer/Shader.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/renderer/Shader.cpp.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/src/renderer/TestCube.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/renderer/TestCube.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/renderer/TestCube.cpp.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/src/renderer/stb_image.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/renderer/stb_image.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/renderer/stb_image.cpp.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/src/resource/ResourceMgr.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/resource/ResourceMgr.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/src/resource/ResourceMgr.cpp.obj.d" )
# Targets to which this target links which contain Fortran sources. set(CMAKE_Fortran_TARGET_LINKED_INFO_FILES )
# Targets to which this target links which contain Fortran sources. set(CMAKE_Fortran_TARGET_FORWARD_LINKED_INFO_FILES )
# Fortran module output directory. set(CMAKE_Fortran_TARGET_MODULE_DIR "")

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Consider dependencies only in project. set(CMAKE_DEPENDS_IN_PROJECT_ONLY OFF)
# The set of languages for which implicit dependencies are needed: set(CMAKE_DEPENDS_LANGUAGES )
# The set of dependency files which are needed: set(CMAKE_DEPENDS_DEPENDENCY_FILES "D:/project/mecraft/glad.c" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/glad.c.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/glad.c.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/main.cpp" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/main.cpp.obj" "msvc" "CMakeFiles/mecraft.dir/main.cpp.obj.d" "D:/project/mecraft/src/core/Camera.cpp" option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /keybindings (snapshot).txt

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Format: Context Action Device Control Trigger Modifiers Gameplay Jump Keyboard SPACE Held - Gameplay Crouch Keyboard LEFT_SHIFT Held - Gameplay Sprint Keyboard LEFT_CONTROL Held - Gameplay Attack Mouse LEFT Pressed - Gameplay UseItem Mouse RIGHT Pressed - Gameplay Menu Keyboard ESCAPE Pressed -
UI Menu Keyboard ESCAPE Pressed - UI Cancel Keyboard ESCAPE Pressed -
Axis Gameplay Vertical Keyboard W S Axis Gameplay Horizontal Keyboard D A
Axis Gameplay LookX Mouse X - Axis Gameplay LookY Mouse Y - Invert

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Format: Context Action Device Control Trigger Modifiers Gameplay Jump Keyboard SPACE Held - Gameplay Crouch Keyboard LEFT_SHIFT Held - Gameplay Sprint Keyboard LEFT_CONTROL Held - Gameplay Attack Mouse LEFT Pressed - Gameplay UseItem Mouse RIGHT Held - Gameplay Menu Keyboard ESCAPE Pressed -
UI Menu Keyboard ESCAPE Pressed - UI Cancel Keyboard ESCAPE Pressed -
Axis Gameplay Vertical Keyboard W S Axis Gameplay Horizontal Keyboard D A
Axis Gameplay LookX Mouse X - Axis Gameplay LookY Mouse Y - Invert
